_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Amuyu sata, manqhani.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan aru aru armas mayacht'ayatawa. Uru aru ukham mayni utasiwa.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Arukuna amtawi Marks janiwa arumakiw. Marks takikuna, janiwa akullakiwi.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ukhamar layra aru mayjt'ayatanwa mayni kamachiriwa. 26 sutin yatiyani.
speakFriend.step1Body: Help Wanted aru qillqatata Arunaka Ñanaki uñt'ayapxta.
speakFriend.step2Body: Yäqikuna arukt'ata. Bounty Poster jiliriw ulanipxta.
speakFriend.step3Body: Apanipxtana ukhamaki Marks luratawa, IP Ledger qillqatawa.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Sasa masicama, mantani."
